title: Access Control
description: Organizations must implement role-based access controls to restrict system access to authorized users based on the principle of least privilege.

title: Data Encryption
description: Sensitive data must be encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent, and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.

title: Incident Response
description: Organizations must maintain and test an incident response plan that covers detection, containment, eradication, and recovery procedures.

title: Audit Logging
description: All security-relevant events must be logged with sufficient detail for forensic analysis, including timestamps, user identifiers, and action descriptions.

title: Vulnerability Management
description: Organizations must scan for vulnerabilities at least monthly and remediate critical vulnerabilities within 30 days of discovery.
